channel.title: Sound_recognition on Sleep as Android Docs
channel.description: Recent content in Sound_recognition on Sleep as Android Docs

item.title: Sound recognition
item.description:
Listens to sounds you make during sleep tracking and categorizes them.

When any of the sounds below is recognized during sleep tracking, a corresponding tag is added to the recording, and the event is created in the sleep record.

Settings -> Sleep noise analysis -> Sound recognition

You can set a sensitivity for each sound category by the slider. You can also disable recognition of specific sound categories by setting the slider to Disabled.
